name: Teller
pricing_notes: Free: 200 connections/mo; paid per active connection ~$0.50-2/mo; enterprise custom

auth.notes: mTLS client certificate authentication; certificate bundle from Teller dashboard

performance.notes: Direct bank connection (no OAuth bank redirect overhead); fast transaction access

agent_readiness.notes: Plaid alternative for US bank account data access. Direct bank connections via Teller's bank partner network. Transactions, balances, identity. mTLS auth is unusual but secure. No OAuth credential storage. Instant bank verification.

gotchas: mTLS authentication unusual — certificate management required
Bank coverage less comprehensive than Plaid
Smaller developer community and ecosystem vs Plaid
best_when: US-based fintech apps wanting Plaid alternative with different pricing
Applications needing bank account verification without OAuth redirect friction
Teams valuing mTLS security over OAuth for financial data
AI financial agents that need transaction data access
avoid_when: Applications needing widest bank coverage (use Plaid)
summary: Teller provides direct US bank account data access (transactions, balances, identity) as a Plaid alternative. Uses mTLS client certificate auth instead of stored OAuth credentials. More limited bank coverage than Plaid but cleaner security model. Per-connection pricing may be cheaper for lower-volume use cases. US-only with instant bank verification.
